required_behavior: Dispatch Protocol 775 Play clientbound official packet id 0x11 to the existing WindowClose decoder so the official ClientboundContainerClosePacket body 07 decodes, preserves container id 7, and consumes the full body.
forbidden: Do not edit oracle answers or expected bytes.
Do not read official jars or decompiled official sources while applying the Rust fix.
Do not broaden the change beyond the allowed_write_scope.
Do not implement menu lifecycle behavior, screen close behavior, inventory state, or initialized game-state behavior.
stop_boundary: This fix is only for Play clientbound minecraft:container_close / 0x11 packet dispatch/decode for one official container id fixture. It does not prove menu lifecycle behavior, screen close behavior, inventory state, runtime Play entry, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
